t32.subject: Dynamic task_pin_visible based on terminal height
t32.description: Change TASK_PIN_VISIBLE from fixed 6 to dynamic: `rows <= 10 ? 0 : min(5, max(3, rows - 14))` matching Claude Code's approach. Prevents task pin from eating the whole screen on small terminals.

t62.description: agents.rs mixes agent state management, lifecycle transitions (spawn/complete/fail), and the agent registry. Split into state.rs (data types + transitions), lifecycle.rs (spawn/cancel/cleanup), registry.rs (lookup/storage). Thin mod.rs re-exports public API.

Medium complexity — needs new App state + input + render coordination.

t34.subject: Smart task ordering in pinned row (priority sort)
t34.description: Reorder tasks in pinned row: recently-completed (fade tail) first, then in-progress, then pending (unblocked before blocked). Matches Claude Code's priority ordering instead of our current flat iteration.

t31.subject: Show activeForm/live activity text under running tasks
t31.description: When a task is in_progress and its owner agent is running, show the agent's current activity description (from subagent progress) as a dim indented line below the task subject. This is the live "what they're doing now" text Claude Code shows.

t61.subject: Git commit each split cleanly with descriptive messages

t54.subject: Fix broken test build: double-nested mod tests bug
t54.description: The previous session ended with a broken `cargo test` build. `input/tests.rs` and `render/tests.rs` both wrap content in `mod tests { use super::*; }` but the parent `input.rs`/`render.rs` already declares `mod tests;` — causing double-nesting where `use super::*` resolves to the empty `tests` module instead of the parent. Fix by removing the outer `mod tests { ... }` wrapper from the file-based test modules so the content lives at file scope with `use super::*;` directly.
t54.acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace compiles and all tests pass
t54.verification_command: cd /home/cole/RustProjects/active/jfc && cargo test --workspace 2>&1 | grep -E "^test result:|^error" | head -20
